title: Add Oráculo de la Era Salvaje · IA Bestias y Monstruos to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The Oracle of the Wild Era
gist.blurb: A new community app has sprouted! The 'Oráculo de la Era Salvaje' brings epic AI lore, boss strategies, and beastly knowledge for the Roblox game Bestias y Monstruos.
gist.summary: Added 'Oráculo de la Era Salvaje', a community-built AI chat app for the Roblox game Bestias y Monstruos, to the Pollinations app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore an epic AI oracle to learn about beasts, bosses, strategies, and lore from the wild world.
gist.visual_concept: A mystical oracle theme mixed with friendly monsters. Polly the bee acting as a wizard or adventurer, consulting a glowing crystal or ancient tome with a friendly pixel monster.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, consulting a glowing mystical crystal ball alongside a friendly, chunky pixel monster. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, consulting a glowing mystical crystal ball alongside a friendly, chunky pixel monster. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

app_name: Oráculo de la Era Salvaje · IA Bestias y Monstruos
